name: Templates
description: Find and render predefined templates for emails and messages.

commands.render_template: Render a template by replacing its variables and combining header/body/footer.

function.name: TEMPLATES__list_templates
function.description: Lists all available templates for messages and emails. Use this to see what templates are available, what their IDs or exact names are, and what variables they require before rendering.

function.name: TEMPLATES__render_template
function.description: Renders a template by injecting the provided variables and combining its Header, Body, and Footer into a single string. Use this before sending a message if the user asks you to use a specific template.

template_id_or_name.description: The exact ID or Name of the template to render.

variables.description: A JSON-formatted string representing a dictionary of variables to inject (e.g. '{"nome": "Mario", "ordine": "1234"}'). Use an empty string '{}' if the template requires no variables.
